label: Sub-sound def
description: Defines one playable audio layer within a SoundDef, including grain selection, volume, pitch, and parameter mappings.

name.label: Name
name.description: Optional name for this sub-sound, used for debugging and targeting.

onCamera.label: On camera
onCamera.description: If true, this sub-sound only plays if the source is on the visible camera area.

muteWhenPaused.label: Mute when paused
muteWhenPaused.description: If true, this sub-sound is silenced when the game is paused.

tempoAffectedByGameSpeed.label: Tempo affected by game speed
tempoAffectedByGameSpeed.description: If true, the playback rate scales with the game speed multiplier.

grains.label: Grains
grains.description: Audio grain list. One grain is selected randomly each time the sub-sound plays.

volumeRange.label: Volume range
volumeRange.description: Random volume range. A value is chosen each time the sub-sound plays.

pitchRange.label: Pitch range
pitchRange.description: Random pitch range. A value is chosen each time the sub-sound plays.

distRange.label: Distance range
distRange.description: Min/max world distance at which this sub-sound is audible.

repeatMode.label: Repeat mode
repeatMode.description: Controls how the same grain is avoided across multiple plays.

paramMappings.label: Parameter mappings
paramMappings.description: List of parameter mappings that modulate volume, pitch, or filter properties at runtime.

filters.label: Filters
filters.description: Audio filters applied to this sub-sound.

startDelayRange.label: Start delay range
startDelayRange.description: Random delay in seconds before this sub-sound starts playing.

gameSpeedRange.label: Game speed range
gameSpeedRange.description: Minimum and maximum game speed at which this sub-sound plays.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Optional string tag for this sub-sound.

sustainLoop.label: Sustain loop
sustainLoop.description: If true, the grain loops continuously while the sustainer is active.

sustainLoopDurationRange.label: Sustain loop duration range
sustainLoopDurationRange.description: For looping sustainers, a random duration range (in seconds) before restarting the grain.

sustainIntervalRange.label: Sustain interval range
sustainIntervalRange.description: Random interval (in seconds) between grain plays on a non-looping sustainer.

sustainIntervalFactorByAggregateSize.label: Sustain interval factor by aggregate size
sustainIntervalFactorByAggregateSize.description: SimpleCurve mapping aggregate source count to a sustain interval multiplier.

sustainAttack.label: Sustain attack
sustainAttack.description: Fade-in time in seconds when the sustainer starts.

sustainSkipFirstAttack.label: Sustain skip first attack
sustainSkipFirstAttack.description: If true, the fade-in is skipped for the very first sample of the sustainer.

sustainRelease.label: Sustain release
sustainRelease.description: Fade-out time in seconds after the sustainer ends.

randomStartPoint.label: Random start point
randomStartPoint.description: If true, looping clips start at a random position instead of the beginning.

canVacuumDampen.label: Can vacuum dampen
canVacuumDampen.description: If true, this sub-sound is muted in vacuum biomes.
